title: SPEmotes Translations
description: The translation of SPEmotes into different languages
body:
The resource pack adds a translation of all SPEmotes emotes into English

**The translation was developed by people:**
MuSL_I / Orvyla / wykard / goobang / F0lia / MeDUlka traktor / qiqimora
Help with translation: 3APA3EH

It is planned to add translations into other languages in the future
